title: Thirst
tmdbOverview: A respected priest volunteers for an experimental procedure that may lead to a cure for a deadly virus. He gets infected and dies, but a blood transfusion of unknown origin brings him back to life. Now, he’s torn between faith and bloodlust, and has a newfound desire for the wife of a childhood friend.
synopsis: Thirst (2009) is a drama, horror and thriller film from South Korea. It holds a solid 7.1 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2000s and genre rankings. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
